description: Style Note Simple, understated and undeniably hot: that's the USP of the label roxy. The colour and style add a feminine charm to this range of T-shirts. Team this one with jeans, capris or shorts, and look effortlessly great!Product DetailsBlue top with a round neckline and branding on the chestMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
